course_title: AGRICULTURAL AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT IN AFRICA
description: Composition, organization, and techniques of agricultural production; economic change and development of agriculture, economic policies, special problems of developing African agriculture.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: A A E 101(215 prior to Fall 2024),ECON 101,111, or graduate/professional standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: A A E 101(215 prior to Fall 2024),ECON 101,111, or graduate/professional standing
